query: SELECT w.sessionDate, w.dayLabel, JSON_EXTRACT(w.exercises, '$') as exercises FROM workouts w WHERE w.userId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'jake@jakehickman.com') AND JSON_SEARCH(w.exercises, 'one', '1-Arm DB Preacher Curl', NULL, '$[*].name') IS NOT NULL ORDER BY w.sessionDate DESC LIMIT 5;
